---
title: "Cozy Robots"
---


And as for hobbies... I enjoy printmaking and painting cozy New England scenes which for some reason have robots in them. 

For example, this robot is attending a zoom meeting and examining a bar chart: 

<img src="zoom.JPG" style="width:50%">


For more art visit [rootahdah.com](https://www.rootahdah.com)!
